name: Parim Usha
summary: Detail-oriented Computer Science graduate with a strong foundation in full-stack development, AI integration, and software engineering. Proven ability to build and deploy scalable web applications using React, Next.js, and Node.js. Passionate about leveraging cutting-edge technology to solve complex problems and deliver high-impact user experiences.

experience.description: Developed and integrated AI-powered features for a suite of career tools. Optimized frontend performance and implemented responsive designs using Tailwind CSS and Next.js.

projects.name: AI Resume Maker
projects.description: A full-stack application that leverages AI to help users build professional resumes with automated content generation.

projects.name: YouTube Summarizer
projects.description: An AI tool that generates concise summaries of YouTube videos by analyzing transcripts.
